feedback_summary: - Independent test verification failed during collection: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tiktoken'. The test file tests/unit/test_assembly.py and implementation src/fleet_memory/retrieval/assembly.py both import tiktoken, but it is not installed in the test environment. While tiktoken was added to pyproject.toml dependencies, the environment needs to be updated (e.g., pip install -e .) before tests can run.: Ensure the worktree test environment has all dependencies installed. Run 'pip install -e .' in /Users/richardwoollcott/Projects/appmilla_github/fleet-memory/.guardkit/worktrees/FEAT-MEM-05/ to install the package with its dependencies, then verify tests pass with 'pytest tests/unit/test_assembly.py -v'.
